task_completion.description: Navigate to the Quotas section for the correct survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey admin interface is visible, the survey 'Consumer Electronics Preferences Study 2024' is selected, and the 'Quotas' management screen is open.
A quota named 'Young Male' is created with a limit of 25, the action set to terminate the survey, and conditions set to GENDER=Male and AGE_RANGE=18-34.
A quota named 'Young Female' is created with a limit of 25, the action set to terminate the survey, and conditions set to GENDER=Female and AGE_RANGE=18-34.
A quota named 'Mid-Age Male' is created with a limit of 25, the action set to terminate the survey, and conditions set to GENDER=Male and AGE_RANGE=35-54.
A quota named 'Mid-Age Female' is created with a limit of 25, the action set to terminate the survey, and conditions set to GENDER=Female and AGE_RANGE=35-54.

task_completion.description: Verify all four quotas are successfully saved and listed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quota summary/list page displays all 4 quotas ('Young Male', 'Young Female', 'Mid-Age Male', 'Mid-Age Female') simultaneously, each showing a limit of 25.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the LimeSurvey admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) is visible navigating to http://localhost/index.php/admin and interacting with the web UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show SQL queries, PHP scripts, or curl commands being executed to directly insert quotas into the database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with genuine LimeSurvey web elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show actual LimeSurvey dropdowns, input fields, and tables, rather than a text editor or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey is 'Consumer Electronics Preferences Study 2024'. The task requires creating exactly 4 quotas. Each quota must have a limit of 25 and an action to terminate the survey. The quotas and their required interlocking conditions are: 1. 'Young Male' (GENDER=Male, AGE_RANGE=18-34); 2. 'Young Female' (GENDER=Female, AGE_RANGE=18-34); 3. 'Mid-Age Male' (GENDER=Male, AGE_RANGE=35-54); 4. 'Mid-Age Female' (GENDER=Female, AGE_RANGE=35-54). Note: The task description cuts off at 'AGE_RANGE=3', but it refers to the '35-54' age range.
